SELECT r.ROLENAME, r.DESCR, COUNT(u.OPRID) AS MEMBER_COUNT FROM SYSADM.PSROLEDEFN r LEFT JOIN SYSADM.PSROLEUSER u ON u.ROLENAME=r.ROLENAME GROUP BY r.ROLENAME, r.DESCR ORDER BY MEMBER_COUNT DESC FETCH FIRST 20 ROWS ONLY

SELECT u.OPRID, o.OPRDEFNDESC, COUNT(*) AS ROLE_COUNT FROM SYSADM.PSROLEUSER u JOIN SYSADM.PSOPRDEFN o ON o.OPRID=u.OPRID GROUP BY u.OPRID, o.OPRDEFNDESC ORDER BY ROLE_COUNT DESC FETCH FIRST 20 ROWS ONLY

SELECT column_name FROM all_tab_columns WHERE table_name='PSPROJECTDEFN' AND owner='SYSADM' AND column_name IN ('DESCR','DESCRLONG','TREENAME','TREE_NAME','LASTUPDDTTM','LASTUPDOPRID','LASTSAVEDDTTM','EFFDT','SETID','PACKAGEROOT','QUALIFYPATH','APPCLASSID','FIELDNAME') ORDER BY column_name

SELECT OPRTYPE, COUNT(*) AS N FROM SYSADM.PSOPRDEFN GROUP BY OPRTYPE ORDER BY N DESC

SELECT u.OPRID, o.OPRDEFNDESC, COUNT(*) AS ROLE_COUNT FROM SYSADM.PSROLEUSER u JOIN SYSADM.PSOPRDEFN o ON o.OPRID=u.OPRID GROUP BY u.OPRID, o.OPRDEFNDESC ORDER BY ROLE_COUNT DESC FETCH FIRST 20 ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) AS N FROM SYSADM.PSOPRDEFN WHERE LASTSIGNONDTTM > SYSDATE - 30
